creator: dewayne@heuristicsystems.com.au
text:
Thanks for your help.
Samba41 successfully rebuilt packages during standalone attempts. During a build cycle involving portmaster and pkg to build 501 ports, an interaction between dns/py-dnspython and net/samba41 ocurred as described earlier. Deinstalling py-dnspython and clearing $STAGEDIR as a prerequisite to samba41 enabled the suite of packages to be built for each of the target platforms. Our build procedures evolved over 11 years and will be reviewed.
